Home   /   Past Events   /   B3CF Shooting Competition 2020

B3CF Shooting Competition 2020

Exhilarating Sporting Competition

On 17 September 2020, the British & Commonwealth Chamber of Commerce in Finland (B3CF), in cooperation with Pohjois-Hämeen Ampujat (PHA) shooting club invited all our members to an exhilarating clay target shooting competition. Despite the stormy weather, the second annual B3CF Shooting Competition was a wonderful and invigorating day of sport, thoroughly enjoyed by all our members and guests.

Congratulations to the winners of each league! 
Pro: 1. Joonas Pyhälä 2. Sarita Nieminen 3. Mika Nieminen 
Semi-pro: 1. Garry Parker 2. Petri Huru MP 3.  Jukka Raatikainen. 
Rookies: 1. Milena AbbasMamode 2. Kimmo Lahtinen 3. Mihut Naita 

The day was brought to a perfect end with delicious food by Sausages Finland, and a selection of drinks.  The event was supported by Mr Moore Motorcycles, Palkintotehdas, Taitokaari, and Wigren Catering.  Thank you to Pohjois-Hämeen Ampujat (PHA) shooting club for hosting us at your fantastic range in Lempäälä.

Finally, a special thank you to everyone who attended this memorable day of shotgun shooting and networking. We hope to see you next year! Watch the video of the event

Click any picture to see the whole gallery for the event.
